name: ublock-ultimate
description: uBlock Ultimate — efficient Chromium and Firefox MV3 content blocker
author: SkuuIll

scripts.lint: eslint build.mjs tools/firefox-lint.mjs tools/manifest-targets.mjs tools/modern-audit.mjs tools/package-release.mjs src/extension/js/hybrid-filter-updater.ts src/extension/js/newtab.js src/extension/js/storage-schema-v2.ts src/runtime tests
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run lint:firefox && npm run audit && node tools/package-release.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run lint:firefox && npm run audit
